case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KILWONNA JETER et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JETER, KILWONNA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JETER, KILWONNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 112 DAKOTA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
